mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM member m JOIN social_account s ON m.id = s.member_id WHERE s.provider = #{provider} AND s.provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, name, role, created_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{name}, #{role}, NOW())
INSERT INTO social_account (member_id, provider, provider_id, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, NOW())
